description: A person affiliated with a Partner Organization. Links the human by Person (the identity spine, ADR 042), not Frappe Contact, so one human is one Person across all roles.

fields.description: Role this person holds at the organization, e.g. "Senior Pastor", "HR Contact".
fields.label: Role at Organization

fields.description: The main point of contact for this organization.
fields.label: Primary Contact

fields.description: Whether this person may be assigned as a site supervisor for internship placements. Uncheck to block a specific contact.
fields.label: Can Supervise Interns

fields.description: Reserved for the Partner portal (phase 1): the User this contact signs in as. Multiple contacts per organization can each have their own portal user.
fields.label: Portal User

fields.description: Reserved for the Partner portal (phase 1): grants this contact portal access for the organization.
fields.label: Portal Access

name: Partner Contact
